# Copilot instructions for this repository

## Build, run, and lint
- Dev server: npm run dev  # vite dev
- Production build: npm run build  # vite build
- Development-mode build: npm run build:dev  # vite build --mode development
- Preview production build locally: npm run preview  # vite preview
- Lint: npm run lint  # runs `eslint .`

Notes / examples:
- Lint a single file: npx eslint D:\munaspher\src\components\Header.tsx --ext .ts,.tsx
- There is no test runner configured (no "test" script in package.json).

## High-level architecture
- Framework: Vite + React (React 19) generated by a TanStack / Lovable template.
- Routing: TanStack Router file-based routes under `src/routes/*`.
  - `src/routes/__root.tsx` defines the root route and HTML shell.
  - Page routes use `createFileRoute` (e.g., `src/routes/index.tsx`).
  - `src/routeTree.gen.ts` is automatically generated by TanStack Router — do NOT edit it.
- Router: `src/router.tsx` creates the router used by client and server (default error UI lives here).
- Server entry: `wrangler.jsonc` points `main` to `@tanstack/react-start/server-entry` for Cloudflare Workers integration.
- Styling: Tailwind + `src/styles.css` imported in the root head (`?url` import in __root).
- Components: UI is split into small presentational components under `src/components` (Header, HeroSection, etc.).
- Path alias: `@/*` is configured in tsconfig.json to map to `./src/*`.

## Key repository conventions
- Do not modify generated files: `src/routeTree.gen.ts` is regenerated by the router builder.
- Route files follow TanStack conventions: use `createRootRoute` for the root and `createFileRoute` for pages.
- Vite config: `vite.config.ts` imports `@lovable.dev/vite-tanstack-config`. That package already injects many plugins — avoid re-adding the same plugins to prevent duplicate-plugin issues (see comment in vite.config.ts).
- Cloudflare/Wrangler: `wrangler.jsonc` contains compatibility flags (nodejs_compat). Deploys are expected to use the React Start server entry.
- ESLint: custom config is in `eslint.config.js` using a `typescript-eslint` wrapper. Lint script is `eslint .`.
- Imports: prefer the `@/` alias for internal imports (e.g., `@/components/Header`).
- Errors: The app uses a default error component (see router.tsx) which presents a helpful UI; in DEV it exposes error.message for debugging.

## Files and edits to avoid
- Do not hand-edit `src/routeTree.gen.ts`.
- Do not duplicate or re-register Vite plugins already provided by `@lovable.dev/vite-tanstack-config`.

## Commit message note for automation
- Repository tooling expects commit messages to include the following trailer when creating commits via automation or bots:
  Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---

If you want this file extended with examples (common refactors, debugging tips, or mapped component owners), say which areas to expand.
